productDisplayName: Facit Men Trophy BF Blue Briefs
description: Composition Blue brief made of 100% premium cotton in a 1X1 rib knit, has a durable signature logo waistband, double layered front with reinforced seams and printed label on the inner Fitting Low rise Wash care Machine wash warm at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry cleanable This low-rise contour brief from facit is crafted using pure cotton in a 1X1 rib knit that lets the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch in ease. The double layered front and the reinforced seams provide durability, while the printed label on the inside provides abrasion-free comfort. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model with waist 34" and hips 38"
